title: No Elytra Flight
description: Disables elytra flight while still allowing players to equip elytra
body:
This mod disables elytra flight while still allowing players to equip elytra. It works by blocking elytra events for all entities, disabling elytra flight/fall flying.

This mod is effective on both the **server** and the **client**, whether in singleplayer or multiplayer (if you really wanted to, you could install it on your client and use it on a public multiplayer server)

Currently there is no configuation, but below is a list of things I plan to add:
- Dimension whitelist/blacklist
- Player whitelist/blacklist
- Mod Menu toggle for singleplayer
- Disable elytra fireworks
